response: The composer who wrote his music most recently is Michael Tippett. While Luigi Cherubini composed several notable works, including the overture "Overture in G major" and the opera "Ali Baba," his last major composition was "A Child of Our Time," which he completed between 1939 and 1941. Michael Tippett's last major work, "A Child of Our Time," was premiered in 1944, making him the composer who wrote his music most recently.
